name: rails-dev-plugin
description: Rails development plugin with specialized agents and portable Skills. Agents are lean orchestrators that load domain-specific Skills for models, controllers, views, services, jobs, testing, architecture, DevOps, GraphQL, Hotwire, API design, mailers, authentication, caching, Ruby refactoring, object-oriented design, and project convention detection. Adapts recommendations to the project's architecture axes (logic placement and delivery) and auto-detected project conventions. Skills are independently usable and exportable to other platforms.
